definition: The fourfold satipaṭṭhāna framework of body, felt experience, feeling mind, and dhammas.
notes: Use this record for the collective satipaṭṭhāna framework. The project keeps establishments of sati to align with the headword satipaṭṭhāna record and to avoid reimporting foundation-of-mindfulness language.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the collective satipaṭṭhāna framework in governed doctrinal and practice contexts.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not fall back to foundation-of-mindfulness language unless a source-facing discussion explicitly requires it.
